name: Ursula K. Le Guin
bio: American author known for speculative fiction exploring society, gender, and politics.

name: Jane Austen
bio: English novelist celebrated for keen social observation and enduring romantic fiction.

name: Madeline Miller
bio: American novelist best known for mythological retellings including Circe and The Song of Achilles.

name: J.R.R. Tolkien
bio: English writer and philologist, author of The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings.

name: Tara Westover
bio: American memoirist whose work often focuses on family, identity, and education.

name: Gillian Flynn
bio: American writer known for dark psychological thrillers.

name: George Orwell
bio: English novelist and essayist known for political fiction and sharp social criticism.

name: Celeste Ng
bio: American novelist whose fiction often explores family, identity, and belonging.
